item.description:
Release date: 2026-07-21

New

Improvements

  • Clearer progress while NameQuick checks your access. A consistent setup screen now keeps you informed while NameQuick validates your license or finishes activating a purchase.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed managed-license checks getting stuck at launch. NameQuick now opens normally when access is valid, preserves eligible offline access, or shows recovery options when validation cannot complete.
  • Fixed the access screen briefly reappearing after unlock. NameQuick now keeps the setup progress visible until the main window is ready.
